## Source: amazon-inspector (35c3ecacb08f3cfb0b165eadaafd3a0d6acfffc34898a6149370c8cc9ba3843e)
The package money-badger-open-rpc-test-bugbount was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (72bed005637ce1e176a91f2823967cf51bd6922b80c71343d65da7097f6fabbe)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'money-badger-open-rpc-test-bugbount' @ 201.99.100 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
